---
name: New Tracker Adapter
about: Request or contribute support for a new bug tracker
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: adapter, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Tracker
<!-- Name of the bug tracker (e.g., Asana, ClickUp, Shortcut, Azure DevOps) -->

## MCP or API access
<!-- How does Claude Code connect to this tracker? MCP server, REST API, CLI tool? -->
- [ ] MCP server exists
- [ ] REST API available
- [ ] CLI tool available
- [ ] Other:

## Key operations needed
Bug Shepherd needs these operations. Check which ones the tracker supports:
- [ ] List open bugs (with pagination)
- [ ] Get full bug details (title, description, comments, assignee, priority)
- [ ] Add comment to a bug
- [ ] Change bug status (cancel/close)
- [ ] Assign a bug to someone
- [ ] Sprint/cycle/milestone support

## Would you like to contribute this adapter?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, requesting someone else build it

## Additional context
<!-- Anything else helpful: API docs links, MCP server repo, etc. -->
